visual_description: In a dimly lit, crowded hall, a young man with dark hair and glasses, wearing a brown jacket, gestures emphatically with his hand while speaking to a young woman with long, reddish-brown hair. The woman, dressed in a dark top, looks at him with a concerned expression. The background is filled with other people in a state of motion, suggesting a chaotic or urgent situation. A watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible in the top right corner. White Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen. The camera is focused on the two main characters, with the background slightly blurred. A young man speaks in a rushed, panicked, and urgent tone, his voice filled with desperation as he exclaims, "I have to find her before she confesses! By the time dawn breaks, we might both be dead, no chance for us!" The camera angle shifts, showing the young man from a slightly different perspective as he continues to speak, his expression one of intense urgency. The background remains a blur of people and architectural elements, maintaining the sense of a busy, possibly panicked environment. The "风行网" watermark is still present.
